name: SimDecisions Architecture - Multi-Tier AI Agent Orchestration
description: Constitutional AI governance system for multi-agent development. Hierarchical coordination (Regent → Coordinator → Workers) with automated validation gates, healing loops, and traceability. Demonstrates multi-tier 12-factor architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and systematic AI correction mechanisms.
abstract: Portfolio teaser demonstrating multi-tier AI agent orchestration platform under constitutional governance. Includes DEIA Hive (4-tier agent hierarchy), PROCESS-13 (Gate 0 + 3-phase validation with healing loops), traceability system (REQ → SPEC → TASK → CODE → TEST), and strangler fig pattern examples (20-year domain evolution from 2006 C++ to 2026 open standard). Deployed to Railway + Vercel with verified 5.2-day uptime. 1,358 specs completed autonomously at 98.7% success rate.

associatedMedia.name: Five-Tier Architecture Diagram
associatedMedia.description: Mermaid diagram showing clean separation: view (React) → API interface (FastAPI) → service/business logic (DES engine) → persistence (SQLAlchemy Core) → database (PostgreSQL)

associatedMedia.name: Agent Chain Diagram
associatedMedia.description: Mermaid diagram showing DEIA Hive hierarchy: Q88N (human) → Q33NR (regent) → Q33N (coordinator) → BEEs (workers)

associatedMedia.name: Validation Gates Diagram
associatedMedia.description: Mermaid diagram showing PROCESS-13: Gate 0 → Phase 0 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 with healing loops and escalation

associatedMedia.name: Deployment Flow Diagram
associatedMedia.description: Mermaid diagram showing CI/CD: git push → build → deploy → health check

mentions.description: Process Representation, Intent Simulation & Manifestation - Open specification for domain-agnostic process intermediate representation (Apache 2.0)

mentions.name: familybondbot
mentions.description: Full-stack consumer Discord bot with multiple seasons of live usage. Private repo available on request.

releaseNotes: Architecture snapshot as of April 2026. Demonstrates multi-tier 12-factor architecture, AI agent orchestration under governance, systematic validation with healing loops, CI/CD deployment evidence, and 20-year strangler fig evolution.
